title: jasione heldreichii var. glabra
intro: Jasione heldreichii var. glabra is a specific variety of the Jasione heldreichii plant, commonly known as Heldreich's jay or Heldreich's cat's ear, a type of flowering plant in the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Jasione heldreichii var. glabra include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for herbal preparations.
